heading: Payment of cost of meat-inspection service; exception
label: 695 Payment of cost of meat-inspection service; exception
text: The cost of inspection rendered on and after , under the requirements of laws relating to Federal inspection of meat and meat food products shall be borne by the United States except the cost of overtime and holiday pay paid pursuant to .July 1, 1948section 2219a of title 7
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “section 10703 of the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002”, meaning , which enacted , Agriculture, amended this section, , and , Government Organization and Employees, and repealed .Section 2219a of title 7section 10703 of Pub. L. 107–171section 2219a of Title 7section 468 of this titlesection 5549 of Title 5section 394 of Title 7

CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 98 of this titleSection was not enacted as part of the Federal Meat Inspection Act which is classified to subchapters I to IV–A of this chapter.
